oneOf.title: Map Color Component
oneOf.description: Sets the color of the block when rendered to a map. If this component is omitted, the block will not show up on the map.

oneOf.title: Map Color Component
oneOf.description: Sets the color of the block when rendered to a map. If this component is omitted, the block will not show up on the map.

oneOf.title: Map Color Object
oneOf.description: Sets the color of the block when rendered to a map.

color.description: The color used for the map.

oneOf.title: Hex Color
oneOf.description: Color represented as a hex value in the format #RRGGBB

oneOf.title: RGB Array
oneOf.description: Color expressed as an array of [R, G, B] from 0 to 255
